entities.name: Fitness Session Logger
entities.context: CLI tool for logging workout sessions with fields like felt-after, notes, and date

entities.name: Soreness Tracker
entities.context: Sub-command that logs next-day soreness levels (none, mild, moderate, severe) linked to a session ID

entities.name: Recent Sessions Viewer
entities.context: Sub-command to display recent workout sessions with optional exercise breakdown detail

relationships.context: Soreness tracking is a sub-command of the fitness session logging CLI
Recent sessions viewer is a sub-command of the fitness session logging CLI
Soreness entries reference session IDs that appear in the recent sessions view
